title: Ridgeline Watchtowers: Sightline-Free Placement of Maximum Value
strategies: shoreline-ridge baseline: light every cell whose code starts with 0 and whose remaining digits are all 0/1 (a subcube that is always sightline-free), scoring ~0.1
weight-agnostic lexicographic greedy: scan unblocked cells in canonical order and keep each tower iff it forms no collinear sightline with the current set (maximizes count, not value)
value-aware multi-restart greedy: run the frozen scaffold under a value-descending priority plus several seeded perturbations and keep the highest total-value sightline-free set
algebraic product / structured caps: assemble a large cap set as a product of maximum small-dimension caps, then bias selection toward high-value unblocked cells
